question_text: What happens to the brightness of bulbs when you add more bulbs in series?

options.label: C
options.text: The bulbs stay the same brightness

options.label: D
options.text: Only the new bulb gets dimmer

explanation: When you add more bulbs in series, the total resistance increases, so the current flowing through the circuit decreases. This means less current flows through each bulb, making them all dimmer than before.
